# Hua Hin Land — Soi 112

> Prime Chanote land for sale in Hua Hin, Thailand. 4 Rai 2 Ngan, flat terrain, freehold title deed, mountain views. Soi 112 luxury corridor. From ฿2,300,000/rai (≈ $63,000). Partial sale from 1 rai available.

## The Plot
- Size: 4 Rai 2 Ngan (7,200 m² · 1.78 acres)
- Title deed: Chanote NS.4J — freehold, strongest in Thailand
- Terrain: Completely flat, build-ready
- Views: Panoramic mountain views
- Utilities: Water connection in place
- Access: Direct concrete road
- Price: ฿2,300,000/rai · Total ฿10,350,000 · ≈ $285,000 · ≈ €270,000
- Partial sale: Available from 1 rai — different price per rai applies

## Location
- Address: Thap Tai, Soi 112, Hua Hin, Prachuap Khiri Khan 77110, Thailand
- Coordinates: 12.4751699, 99.9073267
- 5 min: Majestic Creek Golf Course
- 10 min: Bluport Mall
- 12 min: Hua Hin Beach
- 15 min: Bangkok Hospital Hua Hin
- 200 km from Bangkok (2.5 hours by car)

## Why Hua Hin
- Royal resort town since 1920s — Klai Kangwon Palace of King Rama VII
- Southeast Asia's golf capital — 10+ championship courses
- JCI-accredited hospitals with English-speaking doctors
- Large international expat community (71 nationalities)
- Popular American retirement destination

- WhatsApp: +66 80 140 6745

- Website: https://www.hua-hin-land.com
